title: macrocalyx micranthus
intro: Macrocalyx micranthus is a plant species belonging to the family Boraginaceae, commonly known as the forget-me-not family. This plant is known for its potential medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial activities. The health benefits of Macrocalyx micranthus include its use in treating respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as its potential to reduce fever and alleviate pain. Herbal preparations of Macrocalyx micranthus can be made by infusing the leaves in hot water to create a tea or by using the plant's roots to create a decoction, both of which are used to harness its medicinal properties.
